article_title: Azure Repos 也能用 Copilot 做代码评审了：预览版怎么开、怎么用、怎么算钱
core_theme: GitHub Copilot code reviews 进入 Azure Repos pull request 的有限公开预览
reader_takeaway: 读者能判断这个预览能力是否适合自己的 Azure Repos 团队，并知道启用、发起评审、关注限制和费用的基本路径
summary_angle: Copilot 评审不是直接全量开放，而是通过预览申请、组织/仓库/用户三层开关、PR 内请求评审、费用监控这条路径进入 Azure Repos

information_blocks.source_anchor: 原文 Sign up for the Technical Preview：limited public preview, sign-up process, enable the feature for their organization
information_blocks.visual_idea: 左上角日历和预览标签，表示 2026 年的有限公开预览

information_blocks.source_anchor: 原文 Getting Started：organization level, individual repositories, user Preview Features
information_blocks.visual_idea: 左下角三个编号检查点，表示组织、仓库、用户三层启用

information_blocks.source_anchor: 原文 Code Review Process：Request button next to Copilot Code Review in Reviewers section
information_blocks.visual_idea: 中心 PR 文档和右侧评审按钮，表示在 PR 里请求 Copilot Code Review

information_blocks.source_anchor: 原文 Guardrails and Limits 与 Billing：preview limits, GitHub AI credit, Azure subscription billing, Cost Management
information_blocks.visual_idea: 右侧仪表和锁形符号，提醒团队关注限制、并发和费用

main_metaphor: 一个 pull request 文档穿过评审门，Copilot 光束正在检查代码变更
primary_subject: 中心的虚构 pull request 文档和 Copilot review badge
subject_action: Pull request 正在被 Copilot 检查，周围有预览、启用、评审、计费四个短标签
composition: 2.35:1 宽幅，中心主物体，左侧启用路径，右侧评审与费用提示，轻微斜向推进
selected_style_prompt_descriptor: soft shojo-inspired manga look, elegant linework, expressive faces, gentle decorative details, luminous pastel accents
selected_style_reason: 随机选中；柔和、清晰的线条适合把预览发布、设置路径和费用提醒压缩成不紧张的产品更新封面
style_safety_note: 该风格不指向特定在世艺术家或具体工作室，prompt 使用安全描述词而非模仿某个品牌或作者
avoid: 真实 Azure DevOps UI 截图
draft_goal: 验证主题、三层启用路径、PR 评审和费用限制四个叙事节点是否能在单张宽封面里读出来
revision_targets: 如果画面像真实 UI 截图，改为更明确的虚构插画
如果信息块超过 4 个或文字太多，压缩为短标签
如果费用和限制被画成假图表，改为抽象仪表或提醒符号
final_prompt: Use case: infographic-story. Asset type: wide cover infographic illustration for a Chinese tech blog article. Create a wide cinematic infographic-story cover illustration that summarizes a Microsoft Azure DevOps update: GitHub Copilot code reviews are entering limited public preview for Azure Repos pull requests. Summary angle: Copilot review moves into Azure Repos PRs, but teams should enable it deliberately: organization setting, repository setting, user preview feature, then request review in a PR. Narrative flow: 3-beat process. Keep one dominant focal PR sheet and three supporting narrative beats: 预览/2026, 启用/1/2/3, 评审, 计费. Use product-poster style illustration with a soft shojo-inspired manga look, elegant linework, gentle decorative details, luminous pastel accents. Wide cover illustration, aspect ratio 2.35:1. Avoid real UI screenshots, fake dashboards, fake charts, fake terminals, fabricated metrics, English slogans, watermark, and decorative clutter.
